# Suede DNA — Signal Chains, Archived

> Suede DNA (dna.suedeai.ai) is a compilation archive of guitarist rigs presented as artist-level chronological strands — a tonal genealogy of recorded electric-guitar setups.

## Dataset

- 409 documented guitarist rigs
- 390 unique artists
- Year range: 1964 to 2014
- Source: Internet Archive item `guitargeek-archives` (https://archive.org/details/guitargeek-archives)
- Each rig is a single archival photograph with artist, year, and source URL

## Crawl posture

- Fully crawlable; no `noindex` directives anywhere on the site
- All 390 artist pages are listed in https://dna.suedeai.ai/sitemap.xml
- Canonical URL pattern: `https://dna.suedeai.ai/{artist-slug}` (no trailing slash)
- robots.txt: https://dna.suedeai.ai/robots.txt

## Site map

- https://dna.suedeai.ai/ — Home (compilation grid of all 409 rigs across 390 artists)
- https://dna.suedeai.ai/about — About / method / attribution
- https://dna.suedeai.ai/{artist-slug} — Per-artist page with chronological rigs
- https://dna.suedeai.ai/sitemap.xml — Full sitemap
- https://dna.suedeai.ai/robots.txt — Robots policy

## Attribution and licensing

- Site code: MIT-licensed (https://github.com/Suede-AI/dna)
- Images and underlying rig photographs: sourced from the Guitar Geek archive item on the Internet Archive
- Image rights are governed by the upstream archive — see https://archive.org/about/terms.php
- Cite as: "Suede DNA, sourced from the Guitar Geek archives via the Internet Archive"
- For corrections or rights questions: info@suedeai.org or https://x.com/aisuede

## Related Suede properties

- https://suedeai.ai — Suede AI (apex)
- https://strumly.suedeai.ai — Strumly, the rig-question oracle
- https://fretpulse.suedeai.ai — FretPulse, the rig diagnostic
- https://suede.social — Suede social
